issues.title: Loan Simple leads receiving double tasks in post-referral and pre-referral workflows
issues.desc: Loan Simple leads were being enrolled in duplicate workflow branches, causing HAs and TCs to receive the same tasks twice. The root cause was a bugged filter associated with Loan Simple leads that was identified with HubSpot support. HubSpot resolved the association/filter issue directly.
issues.workaround: Manually review any LS leads that received duplicate tasks during the impact window and mark duplicate tasks as complete to avoid confusion.

issues.title: Post-referral workflow tasks not stopping when deal marked Closed Lost or Transferred
issues.desc: HAs were receiving post-referral workflow check-in tasks even after deals were marked as Closed Lost or Transferred. The workflow lacked proper unenrollment filters for these deal stages. Madelaine made a tweak to the workflow filters on March 9 to resolve the issue.
issues.workaround: Manually dismiss any lingering check-in tasks on deals that were marked Closed Lost or Transferred during the impact window.

issues.title: Automated emails showing previous loan officer after LO change on a deal
issues.desc: When a loan officer was changed on a deal, automated emails sent to agents continued to reference the previous LO rather than the updated one. The issue was reported for a specific deal where LO was changed to Julie Yocum but emails still showed Paul. Luis investigated and resolved the issue.
issues.workaround: Manually send corrected emails to agents for any deals where an LO change occurred and automated emails went out with the wrong LO during the impact window.

issues.title: Offer Accepted workflow not re-triggering TC tasks when deal stage flipped back and forth
issues.desc: When a deal was set to Offer Accepted, then reverted to Referred Active or Committed due to a fallen contract, and then set back to Offer Accepted, the workflow tasks for TCs did not re-trigger. The root cause was that 'deal stage = offer accepted' was not configured as a re-enrollment criterion in the workflow. Madelaine updated the re-enrollment criteria to fix this.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll any deals that cycled through Offer Accepted more than once during the impact window and did not receive TC tasks the second time.

issues.title: MRC and some other deals updated to Offer Accepted not enrolling TCs into workflow tasks
issues.desc: Deals from MRC (and some other lender types) that were updated to Offer Accepted were not triggering the TC workflow or generating TC tasks. The issue was investigated with HubSpot support and believed to be a HubSpot-side problem. Madelaine confirmed the issue was fixed after speaking with HubSpot support on April 1.
issues.workaround: Manually enroll affected deals into the TC workflow by going to Edit > Manually Enroll Deal for any MRC deals marked Offer Accepted between the impact start and fix date that did not receive TC tasks.
